parameters.query: SELECT c.id AS cliente_id, c.nome_completo AS nome FROM app.cliente c WHERE REGEXP_REPLACE(c.telefone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = REGEXP_REPLACE($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AND c.organizacao_id = $2 AND c.ativo = true LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
// Retorna erro
return [{ json: { response: $input.item.json.message, success: false } }];
